prompt: Recover elegantly when a PubSub message fails execution (e.g. malformed data), routing it to a Dead-Letter recovery loop for fix and retry.
agent_thoughts: Creating a secondary DLQ topic. If an agent crashes parsing a message, it intercepts the exception and pushes the raw bytes to the DLQ.
plan: Publisher sends bad JSON. Processor crashes, pushes to DLQ. Recovery Agent fixes JSON and re-publishes.
patch: System parsed the poison pill, recovered it, and cleanly executed the patch.
reason: DLQ isolation prevented the poison pill from crashing the main Event Bus consumer loop.
